title: tragia cannabina var. brouniana
intro: Tragia cannabina var. brouniana, also known as Broun's horse-nettle, is a variety of the Tragia cannabina plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the Euphorbiaceae family. The plant is primarily valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. It is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, and is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is prepared by making a tea from its leaves and roots, or by using it in ointments and salves to apply topically for skin issues.
